name: AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate (SAA-C03)
description: Associate-level certification for individuals who design distributed systems on AWS. Validates ability to design solutions that are secure, resilient, high-performing, and cost-optimized. 1+ years of hands-on experience recommended. 65 questions, 130 minutes, 720/1000 passing score.
exportIntroQuestions:
## About this document

This document contains practice exam questions related to the **AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate (SAA-C03)** certification.

### Certification context
This certification validates expertise in:
- Designing secure architectures on AWS
- Designing resilient and highly available architectures
- Designing high-performing architectures
- Designing cost-optimized architectures

### Purpose
This document compiles practice exam questions for study and review. Each question includes:
- The complete original question statement from the practice exam
- Justification explaining the concept behind the correct answer and the errors in the incorrect alternatives.

### Learning objective
Serve as reference material for discussion and deeper understanding of solutions architecture concepts on AWS.
exportIntroTranscripts:
## About this document

This document contains technical summaries of lesson transcripts related to the **AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate (SAA-C03)** certification.

### Purpose
Organizes and synthesizes lesson content in a structured format for quick review and deeper understanding of the concepts presented.
exportIntroChat:
## About this document

This document contains AI study conversations related to the **AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate (SAA-C03)** certification.

### Purpose
Records discussions and explanations generated during interactive AI study sessions, serving as complementary reference material.

domains.name: Design Secure Architectures
domains.description: Domain 1 (30%): Design secure access to AWS resources, design secure workloads and applications, determine appropriate data security controls.

domains.name: Design Resilient Architectures
domains.description: Domain 2 (26%): Design scalable and loosely coupled architectures, design highly available and fault-tolerant architectures.

domains.name: Design High-Performing Architectures
domains.description: Domain 3 (24%): Determine high-performing and scalable storage solutions, design high-performing and elastic compute solutions, determine high-performing database and networking solutions.

domains.name: Design Cost-Optimized Architectures
domains.description: Domain 4 (20%): Design cost-optimized storage, compute, database, and network architectures.
